name: Archrock, Inc.
business: Archrock provides natural gas compression services and aftermarket services to customers in the energy industry. Its contract operations include designing, owning, and maintaining compression equipment. Its aftermarket services include operations, maintenance, and parts sales for customer-owned equipment.
sellsTo: large integrated and independent oil and natural gas processors, gatherers, transporters
approximately 300 customers in all major U.S. producing regions

exposures.sentence: We are an energy infrastructure company with a primary focus on midstream natural gas compression and a commitment to helping our customers produce, compress and transport natural gas in a safe and environmentally responsible way.

expected increased natural gas demand in the U.S. from the growth of liquefied natural gas exports, exports of natural gas via pipeline to Mexico, power generation of AI data centers and industrial uses.

catalysts.sentence: On May 1, 2025, we completed the NGCS Acquisition, whereby we acquired all of the issued and outstanding equity interests in NGCS, including a fleet of approximately 326,000 operating horsepower and an 18,000 horsepower backlog of contracted new equipment, for aggregate total consideration of $349.4 million.

catalysts.event: Closed sale of certain contract operations assets to Flowco
catalysts.sentence: On August 1, 2025, we completed the sale of certain contract operations customer agreements and approximately 155 compressors, comprising approximately 47,000 horsepower, used to provide compression services under those agreements along with other supporting assets.
On November 17, 2025, we repurchased our 2027 Notes.
On December 12, 2025, we amended our Amended and Restated Credit Agreement.

catalysts.event: Board approved additional $100 million share repurchase authority through December 2026
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, our Board of Directors approved an additional increase to our Share Repurchase Program of $100.0 million through December 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to spend $400-$445 million on capex in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We currently plan to spend approximately $400 million to $445 million on capital expenditures during 2026, primarily consisting of approximately $250 million to $275 million for growth capital expenditures and approximately $125 million to $135 million for maintenance capital expenditures.

catalysts.event: Declared quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share
catalysts.sentence: On January 29, 2026, our Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share of common stock, which was paid on February 18, 2026 to stockholders of record at the close of business on February 10, 2026.
